message:
perf: Use conditional AVX-512 flags throughout codebase

Apply conditional logic from build.zig to all libdeflate compilation sites:
- Native x86_64 (cpu_model=.native): AVX-512 ENABLED via runtime detection
- CI/generic builds: AVX-512 DISABLED via preprocessor macros

Files fixed:
- build.zig: Already had conditional flags (verified correct)
- src/main/compile/batch_build.zig: Fixed condition + use preprocessor macros
- src/main/compile/incremental.zig: Add conditional flags based on builtin.cpu.arch
- src/compiler.zig: Add conditional flags based on builtin.cpu.arch
- src/main/cli/test_commands.zig: Add conditional flags based on builtin.cpu.arch
- packages/token_optimizer/build.zig: Add conditional flags using target info

Performance impact:
- Native x86_64 builds: RESTORED to full AVX-512 speed (runtime CPU detection)
- CI/generic builds: Still compile successfully (AVX2/SSE fallback)

Fixes evex512 compile errors on CI while preserving native performance.
